name: weaviate-ui
description: A browser-based workbench for inspecting Weaviate schemas, objects, inserts, and GraphQL queries.

scripts.chrome:build: npm run build && npm run chrome:sync
scripts.chrome:package: npm run chrome:build && npm --prefix chrome-extension run package
scripts.extension:package: npm run build && npm run extension:sync && npm --prefix vscode-extension run package
scripts.extension:publish:vscode: npm run build && npm run extension:sync && npm --prefix vscode-extension run publish:vscode
scripts.extension:publish:windsurf: npm run build && npm run extension:sync && npm --prefix vscode-extension run publish:open-vsx
